text:
r>中身の候補はたくさんあるけど
遊び心があるものも欲しいなーって。
なにかヒントがあったら、教えてくれない？

※Ｌｖ．１～のエネミーが対象

I know what I wanna do for the
New Year's Festival! We’ll do a raffle for
gift bags full of a bunch of stuff!
Everyone loves surprises like that!
I have all kinds of ideas about
what to put in them, but I really
want something playful, too.
Any ideas?

Enemies must be Level 1 or above
